title: Beetroot Fritters
description: A crispy beetroot fritter recipe with a rich and malaysian twist. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: 2. Peel the beetroot and grate it.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, rich milk, crisp vegetable oil, malaysian chili flakes, salt, and bake powder.
4. Add the grated beetroot to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
5. Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape into patties.
6. Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
8. Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
